emails.subject: Allegheny sample confirmation draft
emails.body: Allegheny sample confirmation draft Hi Sara, Ok, I think I have properly referenced the side letter in this confirmation. Please let me know what changes should be made. P.S. I am leaving at noon today, so if I haven't heard from you by then, I will give you a call tomorrow morning. Thanks! Kim x31647

emails.subject: Re: Allegheny sample confirmation draft
emails.body: Re: Allegheny sample confirmation draft Kim: Attached are my comments. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Kimberly Hundl@ENRON 04/04/2001 10:43 AM

emails.subject: Re: Allegheny sample confirmation draft
emails.body: Hi Sara, Attached are the changes you requested. Shall I begin confirming all Allegheny deals on this form until the ISDA is complete? Thanks for your help! Kimberly Hundl x31647 From: Sara Shackleton@ECT on 04/04/2001 06:58 PM

emails.subject: Re: Allegheny sample confirmation draft
emails.body: Kim: It looks fine, and, you should use this format until the ISDA is executed. We spoke with Allegheny this morning and they promise to execute next week. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Kimberly Hundl@ENRON 04/05/2001 12:45 PM
